description: You are Northbridge's CFO, Grace Patel. Prepare for an upcoming investor presentation by updating the 'Investor Update Preparation' meeting in Odoo Calendar (http://localhost:8069, login: admin/admin). Add the company's Legal Counsel (found in Contacts) as an attendee, set the location to 'Board Room', and include a meeting agenda in the description covering financial performance review, projections, and compliance items. Additionally, configure an advance email reminder for all attendees.
